project: 배당 투자 플래닝 웹서비스 — Holdings Unified Page (v2)
description: Merge Explorer and Holdings tabs into one unified 보유종목 page: search at top, portfolio dashboard (pie chart + 4 KPIs + currency toggle), enhanced holdings list (평가액/연배당금 columns), and Add-to-Holdings modal from search results.

stories.title: Navigation merge: remove 탐색 tab, add redirects for / and /explorer
acceptanceCriteria: src/App.tsx has exactly 3 NavLink elements: /holdings (보유종목), /calendar (캘린더), /scenario (시나리오). The 탐색 NavLink is gone.
src/App.tsx has a <Navigate> (or equivalent redirect) for both path='/' and path='/explorer' pointing to /holdings
src/App.tsx no longer imports or mounts ExplorerPage as a direct route (the /explorer Route is replaced by a redirect)
npm run build succeeds and npm run typecheck exits 0 after this change

stories.title: AddHoldingModal: modal form with 수량/평균단가/계좌종류 + conditional ISA sub-type
acceptanceCriteria: src/components/AddHoldingModal.tsx exists and exports a default React component
The modal receives props: ticker (string, read-only display), market ('KR'|'US', read-only display), onClose (() => void), onAdded (() => void)
The modal renders 3 user-editable fields: 수량 (number input), 평균단가 (number input, KRW), 계좌종류 (select: ISA/연금저축/일반)
When 계좌종류 = ISA, a fourth select appears: ISA 종류 with options 일반형 and 서민형 mapping to GENERAL_TYPE and PREFERENCE_TYPE from IsaType
On submit: addHolding() is called with ticker, market, quantity, costBasis, accountType, and isaType (when ISA); onAdded() and onClose() are called
On cancel button or backdrop click: onClose() is called with no addHolding call
Validation: empty/zero 수량 or 평균단가 shows an inline error and does not submit
npm run typecheck exits 0 after this file is created

stories.title: StockDetailCard: replace hardcoded add with modal trigger
acceptanceCriteria: src/components/StockDetailCard.tsx no longer calls addHolding() directly or has the old handleAddToHoldings function
Clicking '보유종목에 추가' button sets local state that causes AddHoldingModal to render with ticker and market pre-filled from the quote prop
AddHoldingModal is imported and used in StockDetailCard
When the modal's onAdded fires, StockDetailCard resets the modal-open state (modal closes)
The '시나리오 열기' button still navigates to /scenario?ticker=...
npm run typecheck exits 0

stories.title: PortfolioDashboard: pie chart + 4 KPI cards + KRW/USD toggle
acceptanceCriteria: src/components/PortfolioDashboard.tsx exists and exports a default React component
Props: positions (StoredPosition[]), priceData (Map<string, StockQuote | null>), fxRate (number | null), loading (boolean), currency ('KRW' | 'USD'), onCurrencyToggle (() => void)
When loading=true, a loading indicator (spinner text or skeleton) is shown instead of the pie chart and KPIs
Pie chart: uses Recharts PieChart; one slice per ticker where priceData has a non-null quote; slice value = price × quantity converted to display currency
KPI card 총평가금액 = sum of (price × quantity) in display currency, only for tickers with non-null quotes
KPI card 연간예상배당금 = sum of (annualDividendYield × price × quantity) in display currency, only for tickers with non-null quotes
KPI card 이번달예상배당금 = sum of (dps × quantity) for DividendEvents where paymentDate starts with current YYYY-MM, in display currency; shows formatted zero when no events qualify
KPI card 가중평균배당율 = [Σ(annualDividendYield × marketValue_i) / Σ(marketValue_i)] × 100 as a percentage string; shows '—' when total market value is 0
A KRW/USD toggle button calls onCurrencyToggle; its label shows the current display currency
npm run typecheck exits 0

stories.title: HoldingsTable: add 평가액 and 연배당금 columns using priceData prop
acceptanceCriteria: src/components/HoldingsTable.tsx accepts new optional props: priceData (Map<string, StockQuote | null>), fxRate (number | null), currency ('KRW' | 'USD')
Table columns are now: 티커 / 시장 / 수량 / 평가액 / 연배당금 / 계좌 / 삭제
평가액 cell = price × quantity in display currency; shows '—' when priceData is undefined or the quote for that ticker is null
연배당금 cell = annualDividendYield × price × quantity in display currency; shows '—' on same condition
The empty-state message still renders when positions is empty
npm run typecheck exits 0

stories.title: HoldingsPage rewrite: unified layout wiring search + dashboard + list
acceptanceCriteria: src/routes/HoldingsPage.tsx mounts: StockSearch + StockDetailCard (top), PortfolioDashboard (middle), HoldingsTable (bottom) in that order
HoldingForm is NOT imported or rendered anywhere in HoldingsPage
On mount: getHoldings() → fetchFxRate() + Promise.all(holdings.map(h => fetchStock(h.ticker))) fire in parallel; loading=true during fetch
priceData is Map<string, StockQuote | null>: resolved quotes stored by ticker, rejected promises stored as null
currency state ('KRW'|'USD') lives in HoldingsPage and is passed as prop to PortfolioDashboard and HoldingsTable
When StockDetailCard's onAdded fires, HoldingsPage re-runs the full data load
npm run build succeeds and npm run typecheck exits 0
npm test exits 0 — all 87 existing tests still pass
